creator: freebsd-ports@charlieroot.de
text:
Created attachment 214909
Update to 10.4.3

These versions are maintenance releases and contain bug fixes only. They aim to reduce and fix side-effects of recent TYPO3 v10.4.2 and v9.5.17 releases.

For details about the releases, please see:

https://typo3.org/article/typo3-1043-and-9518-maintenance-releases-published
https://get.typo3.org/release-notes/10.4.3
https://get.typo3.org/release-notes/9.5.18
